final:
module top_module(
    input d,  
    input clk,  
    input rstn,  
    output reg q,  
    output qn);always @ (posedge clk or negedge rstn)  
      if (!rstn) q <= 0;  
      else q <= d;  
    assign qn = ~q;  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      q <= d; qn <= ~q;
    end
  end

endmodule
